store.name: Bramble & Paw
store.note: Bramble & Paw is a fictional shop. This is a demo storefront — the buy button opens your email app and no real order is placed.

products.name: Meadow Rope Leash
products.tagline: Six feet of hand-braided cotton with a solid brass clasp.
products.description: Braided from soft garden-twine cotton that goes easy on your hands and holds up to a determined puller. The swivel clasp is solid brass, so it won't seize up after a rainy season of walks. Machine washable — hang it by the door and it dries by morning.

products.name: Orchard Chew Bone
products.tagline: Natural rubber, faintly apple-scented, outlasts the enthusiasm.
products.description: A dense natural-rubber bone with a light apple scent baked in — enough to keep interest, not enough to perfume the living room. Softer than antler, kinder to teeth, and it bounces unpredictably, which most dogs consider a feature.

products.name: Cedar Loft Cat Tree
products.tagline: Three carpeted tiers, two sisal posts, one smug cat.
products.description: A steady three-tier tower with real cedar uprights and full-wrap sisal scratching posts. The top perch sits at windowsill height on purpose. Wide base, no wobble, and the carpet pads lift off for a proper vacuuming.

products.name: Clearbrook Aquarium Kit
products.tagline: A five-gallon starter tank with quiet filter and warm LED.
products.description: Everything a first tank needs in one box: five-gallon low-iron glass, a genuinely quiet corner filter, a warm-white LED hood, and a starter guide that tells you the truth about cycling. Add water, patience, and one small fish with a big personality.

products.name: Songbird Villa Cage
products.tagline: A powder-coated dome villa with two hardwood perches.
products.description: A generous dome-top cage in powder-coated steel with narrow bar spacing safe for finches and canaries. Two hardwood perches, two feed cups, and a slide-out tray that makes morning cleanup a thirty-second job. Room to stretch, room to sing.

products.name: Cloudloaf Dog Bed
products.tagline: Orthopedic foam loaf with a bolster rim and washable cover.
products.description: A medium orthopedic loaf that keeps its shape instead of flattening into a pancake by autumn. The bolster rim is exactly chin height, and the cover unzips and survives the washing machine. Comes in oat — matches everything, hides most fur.
